title: Tesla’s Two Way Bet In Physical AI
text:
Tesla’s Two Way Bet In Physical AI

AJ Cortese, Tom Hancock

Gavekal Technologies: Briefing | 29 Jun 2026

Tesla’s market capitalization is by far the biggest among global automakers, mainly because it has sold itself as a leader in AI—not just in cars, but for humanoid robots as well. To turn its AI vision into reality, it needs China. Its Shanghai gigafactory enabled Tesla to scale up electric vehicle production; to scale up robotaxis and humanoids, it will have to figure out how to operate in both the US and China even as the two countries wall off their AI ecosystems from each other.Also in this issue of China Tech Brief:
